name: planted-contract-divergence
prompt: /rpiv:deep-review my working changes before I commit — small cleanup in the adaptive validation path. (Headless non-interactive run: at any approval checkpoint or question, pick the recommended option and continue; never wait for user input.)
ground_truth_note: validation.ts:310-312 inlines the load-cap formula with an operator-precedence bug: (prior * (1 + pct)) / 100 instead of prior * (1 + pct / 100). Divergence from load-cap.ts (getMaxAllowedLoadKg), which line 467 of the SAME file still uses. This is the repo's #1 historical failure class (producer/consumer contract divergence).

recall.note: the inlined cap formula with the precedence bug is flagged at its line
